title: buccaferrea amplexicaulis
intro: Buccaferrea amplexicaulis, also known as the Congo-bark tree, is a species of plant in the family Celastraceae. Traditionally, the bark of this tree has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory effects, which help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Buccaferrea amplexicaulis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, and aid in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, the bark of this tree is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered to alleviate the mentioned health conditions.
